sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available in sources

special_mechanics.name: Jump
special_mechanics.description: Player can jump to evade gunfire while gun is holstered

special_mechanics.name: Dive/Roll
special_mechanics.description: Player can dive and roll to evade gunfire while gun is holstered

special_mechanics.name: Lateral Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player moves side-to-side in foreground using D-pad. Originally could only move up/down with reticle; redesigned to allow lateral sidestep movement

special_mechanics.name: Dynamite Toss-Back
special_mechanics.description: Enemies throw dynamite sticks which can be caught and tossed back at enemies

special_mechanics.name: Lasso Stun
special_mechanics.description: Lasso weapon can temporarily stun enemies

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative) - No precise physics values documented. Sources contain gameplay mechanics description but no numerical movement parameters, gravity values, or sub-pixel system details. Game is a shooting gallery hybrid rather than traditional platformer; movement is simple foreground sidestep with jump/dive evasion while aiming reticle in background.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Wild Guns (gameplay mechanics)
Wikipedia - Wild Guns (gameplay description and development notes)
